mapper.select: SELECT a.id,a.title,a.neirong,a.time,a.state,a.description,t.tag,a.image,a.page_views FROM article a LEFT JOIN tag t ON a.tag = t.id order by time DESC
SELECT a.id,a.title,a.neirong,a.time,a.state,a.description,t.tag,a.image,a.page_views FROM article a LEFT JOIN tag t ON a.tag = t.id WHERE a.state = 2 order by time DESC
mapper.update: update oldcat.article set state = "0" where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT title,description FROM article WHERE id != #{id} AND state = 2 ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 4;
SELECT SUM(page_views) FROM article WHERE state = 2
